creator: freebsd@get-experience.com
text:
It's just perl, so can run it with almost any webserver. For instance 
with www/nginx + www/p5-FCGI ( http://zlonet.ru/page/nginxperlotrs/ ). 
That's why it would be good to just pull in the apache dependencies if 
selected in config.

On 2014-02-02 10:40, Mikhail Tsatsenko wrote:
> To submitter: please explain how do you run it without "unnecessary" 
> apache?
